title: Everlong
why_this_song: Everlong by Foo Fighters (1997) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "If everything could ever feel this real forever"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "And out of the red, out of her head, she sang"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "And out of the red, out of her head, she sang"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "And I wonder, when I sing along with you"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "If everything could ever feel this real forever"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "ever" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "ever" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "head" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "head" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Everlong" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Everlong" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Everlong" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Everlong", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Everlong" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Everlong" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
